title: ‘Best time to buy a gun… today’: Chilling online trail of suspect behind Trump dinner shooting
summary_full: Social media activity of Cole Tomas Allen, charged in an alleged assassination attempt on President Trump, shifted from gaming to angry political messages. Posts from 2024 and 2025 criticized Trump, questioned election outcomes, and encouraged gun ownership, mirroring a message sent to family before the incident.
